records.title: The Villainess' Mandate
records.synopsis: A slash—and the rotten Holy Empress’ head is sliced by a guillotine. The saintess and the people finally won, returning their broken nation’s Holy Mandate now that the saintess, the main character, is crowned to replace the dead villainess. That was the ending of another otome novel that a spoiled and bratty rich girl read till midnight. Unfortunately for her, the next day, she wakes up as the rotten Holy Empress before her inevitable death.

records.title: Debut or Die!
records.synopsis: After a night of drinking, aspiring civil servant Ryu Gunwoo passes out, only to awaken three years in the past in the body of a young man named Park Moondae. Before he can even assess the situation, he's given a mission: Debut or Die! Now, Moondae has one year to debut as an idol or face his doom. Luckily, he's able to snag a spot on the famous survival program "Idol Inc.," but with his skills so low and the competition so high, does Moondae stand a chance at becoming a shining star?

records.title: The Perks of Being an S-Class Heroine
records.synopsis: On the outside, Ailette Rodeline is an adorable child prodigy. Cooking, brewing tea, alchemy; you name it, she can do it. But this little girl has a big secret: Ailette is a transmigrator! After dying prematurely in her past life, she becomes a character whose world is destined for destruction. With all odds stacked against her, Ailette must figure out how to survive before her life is ripped from her again. Fortunately for her, she finds her salvation in… an insurance package?

records.title: I Shall Master This Family
records.synopsis: The great Lombardi family was once at the top of the empire. After the death of its patriarch, the fate of the family and that of Firentia, born from a Lombardi and a peasant, fall to ruin at the hands of her useless and cruel cousins. But when she’s reincarnated as her seven-year-old self, she’ll work to protect the family’s honor, gain her grandpa Lulac’s favor, and prevent her own father’s death. In this lifetime, there’s only one way for her to win: become the head of their mighty household.

records.title: The Vampire's Last Omega
records.synopsis: After losing the vampire war, humans were downgraded in society as a blood source. The survivors lived in the wild like animals. Alphas and omegas were prized. Teru was a rare omega and the last. After being captured, he retaliates against the alpha vampire who bought him. Prince Kieran has a shameful secret—he can't drink blood... until he finds a human omega for sale. Teru had a choice—will he try to return to his pack or give everything up for a forbidden love that’s more than meets the eye?

records.title: A Scent Not Mine
records.synopsis: Saffron’s scent gland cancer altered his omega hormonal functions… and erased his unique scent. When the disease recurs and his organ is removed, he is placed on a donor waiting list. Life goes on in Chicago until Saffron receives “the call” that he is matched with a compatible scent gland. He meets the donor’s family, including their alpha neighbor, Timber, who recognizes his mate’s scent from him. Can Saffron and Timber help each other face their tragic pasts?

records.title: Soul Forged
records.synopsis: Torrin Gray is deficient, and no one will let him forget it. Immune to the radiation energy from otherworldly rifts that killed most of the population, he's incapable of harnessing its power like the majority of survivors and must work as a lowly boneforger, supplying super soldiers with weaponry as they explore new rifts and battle vicious parabeasts within. But Torrin's life is upended when he witnesses a horrific crime and gains an unconventional ability that could level the playing field.

records.title: The Baengri Clan's Unwanted Granddaughter
records.synopsis: Yeon was just an orphan on the streets when a man claiming to be her father brought her to his family home. But the Baengri estate was a den of vipers that swallowed her whole, and it's only when she's standing at the funeral of the father she never truly understood that she realizes how familiar this story is. When she wakes up six years old again, Yeon knows she can't waste her second chance. This time, she's going to save her father. This time, she's going to live without regrets.

records.title: How to Win My Husband Over
records.synopsis: When I died in an airplane crash, I thought I'd finally escaped my hellish life. However, I found myself in another nightmare when I awoke in the body of Rudbeckia de Borgia, a minor villain from a novel destined to die at the hands of her husband. Surviving the dysfunctional Borgia family is hard enough, but now I have to marry the man who will kill me! Still, it's okay, I just have to convince him, his family, and all his countrymen that I'm completely harmless. How hard can that be?

records.title: The Perks of Being a Villainess
records.synopsis: Dohee lived as a pushover, died miserably, and was reborn in a novel as a notorious villainess. But it turns out that her new life is not without its perks, as Deborah Seymour is also the richest villain alive. Now, all that's left for her to do is lay low and enjoy her carefree lifestyle... if not for the fact that Deborah is fated to be sent to a monastery! Will this ex-doormat find a way to avoid yet another tragic ending, or will the challenges of being a villainess be too much for her?

records.title: Roxana
records.synopsis: Kidnapping, murder, and risqué relationships! Within the scandalous pages of The Abysmal Flower, the downfall of Roxana Agrece’s criminal family is already foretold. So when Cassis Pedelian, the heroine’s older brother, is kidnapped by Roxana’s father, she can either wait for the heroine’s revenge... or take matters into her own hands, since Cassis is the key to her survival. But with deceitful characters on all sides, can Roxana and Cassis trust each other enough to bring down the brutal Agreces?

records.title: I Woke Up as the Ugly Duckling
records.synopsis: Somehow, Sylvia was reincarnated in a character in the novel she had read before. Sylvia Atlante was called an "ugly duckling" lady character in the novel and despised by her family and others. Not wanting to accept her fate, she finds her own way to live peacefully. However, the situation is unfolding in a way she had never expected. Her family is treating her well and handsome men are showing interest... Why is everybody acting like this?

records.title: Legend of the Arch Magus
records.synopsis: A powerful arch magus finally succumbs to his death after failing to further prolong his life, only to find himself in the body of a young man in a medieval kingdom. He finds out that he is the second son of a Duke, exiled to a desolated town by his own family. Shackled by the notorious reputation of his new shell, he tries his best to develop his domain, implementing new policies and innovations, leading his subjects to prosperity. In this world where magic is undeveloped, he shall once again pave a new path.

records.title: The Villainess Flips the Script!
records.synopsis: I woke up inside my favorite novel, not as the protagonist, Luca Winterwald, but as Judith, his abusive aunt and the first character to die—time for a rewrite! I’ll hand Luca off to his loving, long-lost uncle as scripted, and then live my own life far from danger. At least, that was the plan. When his uncle arrives, Luca suddenly calls out, “Don’t leave!” Now, I must protect Luca from impending family tragedy, raise him to become the hero, and turn this villainess’s ending upside down!

records.title: The Wrong Twin
records.synopsis: Freyr and Aleksei were bound together as toddlers by the Triplet Deities during an engagement ritual. The arranged marriage, which was supposed to bring prosperity to both of their kingdoms, had one problem: the one who was supposed to be engaged was Freyr’s twin sister, Freyja. Freyr now must keep up the ruse that he is “she”. Secrets and consequences unfold as the accidentally engaged couple learn various truths that neither were fully prepared for.

records.title: The Cruelty of Salvation
records.synopsis: To Prince Noah Astrid, Olivia Liberty is an angel sent from above. As their continent's first female university graduate, the papers are all over her, and he can finally focus on polo and liberating himself from his royal family. But she has a secret—she's the inventor of the revolutionary Magic Dome who has to stay hidden behind the male name "Oliver." As husband and wife, they may be able to help each other—as long as their cruel society and inconvenient attraction don't get in the way.

records.title: The 4th Princess Just Wants To Rot
records.synopsis: Sophia Elise the Eighth is everything a princess of the Imperium should be: intelligent, demure, and terrifying. So when she’s forced to marry the last prince of a dying Dominion, everyone expects a bloodbath. Instead? She lies in bed eating donuts, reading bad novels. To live her dream life, Sophia must gaslight schemers, gatekeep her reputation, and girlboss her way through a crumbling empire…all while catching feelings for the tragic prince she was forced to marry. "I just want to rot in peace!"

records.title: Primal Soul, Tamer's Heart
records.synopsis: The magical monster apocalypse happened. Nature healed, and humanity adapted. Now, the world lives in harmony with creatures known as Primals. Raised in this new world, Aiden has spent years saving credits and working with his bonded Primal to become a professional tamer: to compete with friends and rivals, explore nature, and participate in televised tournaments. When a hotshot tamer comes to town, looking for a local wilderness guide, Aiden might get that chance sooner than he dreamed.

records.title: The Fantasie of a Stepmother
records.synopsis: When Marchioness Shuri von Neuschwanstein is widowed at the age of sixteen, she is left to raise her husband’s four children and manage his estate until the eldest son inherits it on his wedding day. She earns a terrible reputation as she does what it takes to survive and is heartbroken when she is asked not to attend the wedding. Shuri flees the estate and dies, only to awaken on the day of her husband’s funeral. With a chance to try again, Shuri vows to make things right.

records.title: Queen in the Shadows
records.synopsis: Fallen noble Elena is manipulated into secretly assuming the identity of Veronica, the deceased princess of the grand duchy. At first, Elena is dazzled by the royal life she always dreamed of, but when the real Veronica returns alive and well, Elena is murdered by those she once trusted. However, death isn’t the end of her story. Elena wakes up several years in the past with her memories intact. Her once-trusting heart has iced over, and she now has only one thing on her mind—revenge!

records.title: I Made a Deal with the Devil (Novel)
records.synopsis: "I don't have enough money or power right now, but I will definitely find a way to bring them all to their knees! I'll make them all beg!" She hissed, shaking with anger and frustration. "I will do everything, anything… to make them all regret… even if I have to sell my soul to the devil!" She said with determination flashing in her beautiful eyes. The man smirked. He lifted his fingers and tucked some errant strands of her slightly mussed up hair behind her ear. "Be careful what you wish for, Miss. A certain devil here might really fulfil your wish and claim your soul in exchange." "If that devil is really here, do introduce him to me, handsome. I would like to make a deal with him." Eva drawled out, smirking back at him.

records.title: Dreamseer
records.synopsis: Dreams have shown Aster a future where his country burns and a killer lurks in the shadows. A future he knows he has to change, even if he has to marry a complete stranger. Now he just has to convince Calixtus—a former knight injured during an accident with a magical artifact—to accept his very sudden proposal. Aster has six months to fix things and figure out who is behind the events that haunt his dreams and to do so, he must learn to trust the man – the fiancé – he just met.

records.title: Villains Are Destined to Die
records.synopsis: This game’s got me obsessed! It’s like it’s taken over my life... wait—HARD MODE ACTIVATED. No-no-no-no-no! It has literally taken me and thrown me into the part of Penelope Eckhart. Love is easy as the heroine, but as the hated villain, I’m trying very hard not to die… at the hands of my brothers… the prince… a fork… every possible ending is death! This world is stacked against me, but can my wits and insider game knowledge score the affection of these male characters? Or the reset button???

records.title: Mirror, Mirror On The Wall
records.synopsis: An apple poisons Snow White, aka Winter von Kastel, and is abandoned in a glass coffin. He wakes up years later in Myrkrheim—the afterlife for malevolent fae souls, ruled by a dark elf ruler. King Taerynn believes Winter to be the key to breaking the spell. The unlikely pair must journey to cursed fairytales and restore the Magic Mirror… or be stuck there forever. Will they make it in time before the Evil Queen finds him first, who will stop at nothing to have his beating heart in her hands?

records.title: Revolutionary Princess Eve
records.synopsis: Princess Evienrose, despite advocating fiercely for the rights of the homunculi rebels, now awaits death at their hands… that is until she is poisoned by her own sister! Awakening eight years in the past, Eve now has one goal: become the Empress and liberate the homunculi to stop the rebellion from ever happening! To do this, she appoints the rebel king himself, Mikaelis Agnito, as her personal knight. But with Eve’s scheming sisters standing in the way, the fight for the crown is on, and the fate of the Hadelamid empire rests in her hands!

records.title: Prince of Fire and Ash
records.synopsis: In a world where dragons determine destiny, Markus faces rejection from the very creatures he's meant to bond with and forfeits his noble birthright to his twin sister, Katrina. But on her first tour as the heir apparent, Markus secretly takes her place to spare her from the advances of a vile prince. Amidst court politics, Markus finds solace in Keyne, the elven captain of the guard. Together, they challenge tradition and forge a new path in a society of duty and prejudice.

records.title: Forget My Husband, I'll Go Make Money
records.synopsis: Imprisoned for years, Princess Aristine hides her true nature and that she possesses the Emperor’s Eye—a skill to see past, present, and future that the emperor of Silvanus covets. Finally, her chance to escape comes when her father sends her to Ilugo, Silvanus’ enemy nation, as a scapegoat to incite war under the guise of an arranged marriage to Ilugo’s second prince, a known barbarian. Now ready to take the reins to her life, will Aristine be able to make money to support her freedom?

records.title: Philomel the Fake
records.synopsis: After finding a mysterious book in the imperial garden, Princess Philomel not only discovers that the book's villain shares her name, but that other events in the story are coming true too. Now, she believes that she's an imposter and that the real princess will take her rightful place, leading to the execution of Philomel the Fake! So to avoid a tragic death, she has to make sure the rest of the book doesn't come true. Can this fake princess change what's already been written?

records.title: The Vampire's Consort
records.synopsis: For centuries the Oceanic Empire has been at war with the Farlands—the brutal vampiric empire. A chance at peace arises when the vampire queen proposes a marriage treaty between her son and the human princess of the Oceanic Empire. Prince Ares is as handsome as he is cruel—certain to be as bloodthirsty of a ruler as his mother. Princess Ophelia is beautiful, but selfish, and her father’s most prized possession. A marriage between the two would merge the two powerful empires into one, once and for all. However, Princess Ophelia isn’t going to marry Ares—Veliah is. A servant of the princess, Vel is forced to conceal her identity and marry the prince. If she doesn’t, her father will die. But how can she keep up the façade and kill the prince when the world as she knows it might be built on lies?

records.title: Kingdom of Sun
records.synopsis: The only uncommon aspect of Persephone’s high school life is her unique name. She desires nothing more than quiet stability running her family’s orchard and hopes her friends won’t go far after graduation. Yet when the chilling bursts of gunfire boom, all her wishes are left behind. To save another life, she gives up her own. “We have sought you out for this,” an otherworldly sentience claims to her in the space between. Persephone chooses the chance of rebirth it gives. Not anticipating her memories staying, she becomes Princess Evianna Emara of Solstice, the Kingdom of Sun. Each passing year offers hardship to match comfort, and nothing of Evianna’s life is quiet when the cogs of the world’s fate find in her choice exactly the soul they need.

records.title: Renouncing the Emperor's Heart
records.synopsis: Empress Jovine de Tristane died at the hands of the woman she hated, her husband’s mistress. Then she awakens. Hurled into the past, where her husband and mistress have only begun their affair, the Empress now has a second chance — at bloody revenge! Except second chances rarely go according to plan. And the reappearance of lost magic and a rising rebellion throw Jovine’s plans into chaos…as does a new suitor and her husband’s unexpected obsession with her sudden change of heart. Will all this drive Jovine towards love or is fate an inevitable curse?

records.title: Flirting with the Villain's Dad
records.synopsis: The princess of Livovny is an imposter bent on stealing the emperor’s heart from the woman fated to be his wife. But Yerenika has a major secret: she’s a normal Korean woman who has transmigrated into a novel! After taking over the beautiful princess’s life, she soon learns that she must take her fate—and the original story’s plot—into her own hands. To protect herself and her new family, Yerenika sets her sights on the future villain’s dad to stop the novel’s carnage before it even starts.

records.title: Just Leave Me Be
records.synopsis: Adele was a hapless orphan until a duke gave her a choice: live as a substitute for his dead daughter, or die on the streets. Despite playing this role to the best of her ability, an order for her assassination was given shortly after he married her off. Miraculously, she is sent back in time and decides to make up for the years wasted living a lie. As ancient ruins call to her, can she use her past knowledge and unexpected help from the Black Knight to defeat the dangers ahead and change fate?

records.title: Irelina and the Blood Cursed Sword
records.synopsis: All she wanted was to live in peace without killing. Iris Jin was an assassin for the Fallon Organization. Upon performing her last kill, Iris Jin thought she’d be free of a life of murder, but her leader – a father-like figure – killed her. But Iris didn’t die. Instead, she was reborn as Irelina Mercius, the 9th Concubine of the Golden Empire of Verticulas. Irelina must discover why she’s been given another chance at life and where the original Irelina’s soul went. For, as she will discover, the fate of the entire world hinges on it.

records.title: Let's Hide My Little Brother
records.synopsis: When Kyla Vesta is transported to the world of a tragic gay comic, she has just one goal: save her little brother from being ravaged by men! In particular, she has to hide him from Astair (Astelle?), a beautiful and sadistic man (woman?) who kidnapped her brother in the comic and did unspeakable things to his body and mind. Can Kyla keep her little brother from falling into the embrace of a man (woman?) with sinister intentions?

records.title: The Villainess's Stationery Shop
records.synopsis: What’s a girl to do when she wakes up in the body of a villainess? Meldenique Babelloa is a supporting character in a romance novel starring her fiancé, Duke Lennox Hessman, and… her sister, Sheria! Heartbroken, she eventually dies a tragic death as a villainess… or so the original story goes. Determined not to follow the script, Meldenique resolutely abandons her old life and sets out to open… a stationery shop! Will she succeed in defying fate and building the stationery shop of her dreams?

records.title: Wicked Ones
records.synopsis: With a war looming, mortals and fae battle together to stop the destruction of their realms. A draft begins and William Vandervult, at the young age of sixteen, goes to war. Now a combat medic hiding a plethora of wicked secrets, William has learned to survive in a grim world of maggots, bloodshed, and death. Nicholas Darkmoon, a fae with an affinity for fearsome magic, does not find this war rattled reality so grim, but an adventure to celebrate. When the arrogant Nicholas causes trouble, William doesn’t hesitate to call him out. However, through threats of disembowelment and survival on the run, Nicholas’ anger towards William shifts from deadly to voracious and obsessive. And William learns that tasting a little forbidden fruit in the twilight hours eases the slow decay of war from his rattled mind. The hunger these men have for each other may keep them warm at night, but in the cold trenches of war, affection blossoms, evil stirs, and a shadow looms ever closer.

records.title: Trapped at Home With the Male Leads
records.synopsis: After being reincarnated into the body of the novel's wealthy heiress, Cherry Sinclair quickly realizes that the world is coming to an end, but she’s determined to survive the apocalypse, no matter what. Using the money that came with this new life, she devises a plan to create a shelter to hide from the monsters. What she does not expect, however, is for the male leads of the novel to also end up in the same house! Will all of them be able to work together to survive in this chaos?

records.title: The Emperor Reverses Time
records.synopsis: In the majestic heart of a sprawling empire, the story of Emperor Leonhardt and Empress Elizabeth Isolde von Elysium unfolds. When tragedy strikes and the beloved—by all but one—Empress perishes, Leonhardt discovers a diary that reveals her silent struggles and undying love for him. Overwhelmed with remorse, he seeks out the mystical Witch of the Clock Tower to turn back the sands of time.

records.title: Solo Leveling
records.synopsis: There exist portals to another world. These “Gates” have become as commonplace as air and so too have the hunters that make a living slaying the creatures that reside within them. Among these hunters, Sung Jinwoo is an E-rank, the absolute weakest of the weak. But that won’t stop him from trying to grow stronger to provide for his loved ones.

records.title: The Tenth Realm
records.synopsis: The Wolf King is dead, and Aelif, his twenty-year-old daughter, is left to face the draugar threat alone. As the undead besiege her village, the battle-hardened warrior does her best to fight back, ripping through the beasts with her greatsword, assisted by the runes inscribed onto her body and her massive wolf companion, Thorn. When all hope seems lost, a mysterious, yet alluring woman—known only as Featherless—saves her life. Learning of the Seidha sorcerers’ plot to open the gate into the Tenth Realm, Aelif and Featherless must find a way to stop them, or they risk leaving the fate of Isjord in the hands of a vengeful god.

records.title: Falling for My Family's Rival
records.synopsis: Jack Peck knows his life is going to take a turn for the better when he’s accepted into an elite, exclusive boarding school on scholarship. This will help him get into a good college, which, in turn, will help him save his family’s shaky business. His new roommate, Adam, is brooding, suspicious – and drop dead gorgeous. Adam’s all-business nature is the artic antithesis to Jack’s energetic, optimistic self but, as they say, opposites attract. Their burgeoning feelings hit a major roadblock, though: Adam’s rich, ruthless family are trying to put Jack’s out of business. And now their sons are caught in the middle.

records.title: Gourmet Gaming
records.synopsis: A crunchy, crispy piece of chicken. The stretchy cheese on pizza, and eating ramen at one in the morning! I only wanted to eat delicious food. So why is my life in danger because of eating addiction?! There's a place where I can fulfill my most cherished dream of eating everything I want! The virtual reality game Athenae! I'm just eating well but isn't this a bit weird? The Food God's True Worth. [You have gained +1 STR] The Strength stat went up.

records.title: Leveling Up In A Deadly Contest...With My Co-Workers?!
records.synopsis: Congratulations Milly Hawthorn! Welcome to the God Contest! Are you tired of living paycheck to paycheck in a dead-end job? Are you sick of your heartless boss and crazy coworkers? Do you wish something would finally change in your depressing little life? Well good news! You’ve just been transported to God Contest World. A place of limitless potential, where fantastic powers are only a few monster corpses away—unless they kill you first, of course. Still better than surviving in corporate America, right? There’s just one small catch… That dead-end job? Your heartless boss? Those crazy coworkers? They’re all coming with you! And if you thought dangerous monsters and insane gods were bad, try a power-hungry CEO on superpower steroids! Okay, so maybe it’s not good news. Benefit: You can make some friends! How about an obsessed gamer, your office bully, and a dangerously creative barista? And have you thought about reinventing yourself? You’d make a wonderful witch!

records.title: The Safest Place
records.synopsis: Tristan had been picked on for being gay since before his classmates even knew what it meant. Now a high school junior, he's convinced there’s nothing he can do to escape their taunts and torments. Marcos is the scariest guy at East High. He was expelled from his previous school for fighting. Rumors abound as to what exactly happened there. The only time he lets his guard down is around his younger brother Santi. Quite by accident, Tristan discovers that if he sticks close to Marcos the bullies leave him alone. Tristan’s bully-prevention plans are complicated, however, when he develops a serious crush on his protector. Ultimately the safest place to be is either very close, or very very far away.

records.title: My Farm by the Palace
records.synopsis: When Hazel Mayfield is sent to live with the Martins as a child, she falls in love with rural life and vows to have a farm of her own one day. Eleven years later, she receives an unexpected windfall as her grandfather hands her the deed to a plot of land in the middle of the capital. Ecstatic, Hazel sets out to realize her longtime dream of becoming a farmer. There’s only one problem: Her new farm is right next to the imperial palace! And it seems the emperor himself has his eye on her land…

records.title: The Little Lady Behind the Scenes
records.synopsis: Julianne is as close to perfect as it gets: she’s got looks, talent, and smarts. The only problem is she has terrible taste in men! That’s why her little sister Lilianne is doing everything she can to make sure she doesn’t end up with the wrong guy. However, Julianne’s suitors are quickly catching on that the way to her heart is through Lilianne’s sweet tooth! How far will Lilianne go to set her sister up with the right man? Who will be the sweetest suitor?

records.title: Umbris: Covenant of Corruption
records.synopsis: Brennon is an Umbra, an illegal magic user whose impure power is deadly and only growing stronger. Hiding within Vitalos, the last safe city sheltered from corruption, Bren is hunted by the authorities, rogue magic wielders, and nightmarish creatures. There is no one he can trust… Especially not Ryva, the witty, cunning, and painfully flirtatious demon he summons as his safeguard. Through ancient spells and dangerous legends, the two find their fates intertwined. With Ryva’s help, Bren is desperate to decipher the mysteries surrounding his magic before he’s captured, killed, or worse…succumbs to the corruption that all of Vitalos fears.

records.title: The Villain's Sidekick
records.synopsis: Niko has been obsessed with the Owen Thorn book series his entire life. Just like the characters in the book, he dreams of attending a magical wizarding school, befriending the students, and becoming a powerful magician. But what happens when Niko actually gets his wish and enters the world of the book? Will he be able to avoid influencing and possibly destroying the timeline—especially when he finds himself in a love triangle between the series hero and villain? And why the hell has the villain made him his sidekick?!

records.title: The Divorcée's Dessert Cafe
records.synopsis: After nine miserable years of marriage, Erin de Brisia is thrilled when her husband, Duke Raymond Von Lebensberg, accuses her of infidelity as an excuse to be with his own lover. After signing the divorce papers, she uses the recipes from her late mother to open a dessert cafe and receives rave reviews. But when her ex-husband and his lover get wind of this, they’re set on sabotage. Will Erin ever be able to taste the sweetness of success, or is this divorcée doomed to disaster?

records.title: The Prince and the Pirates
records.synopsis: The quick-witted (and rarely quiet) mer-prince Castian is ready for an adventure. A sketchy deal with a sea witch gives Cas legs and the chance to join brooding Captain Valentine’s rag-tag pirate crew aboard the Scarlet Mamba. Plenty of high jinks and sassy banter take these lovable characters through secret missions and run-ins with monsters—and they occasionally stir up some unexpected emotions. Oh, and did we mention there’s a musical number?

records.title: A Ranker's Guide to the Good Life
records.synopsis: A word of advice: do NOT under ANY circumstances listen to a puppy-eyed, time-traveling punk who claims he needs your help to save mankind–you’ll never be able to get rid of him. I mean, sure, I’m Jio Gyeon–Korea’s first S-tier hunter, the world’s top ranker, and Sorcerer King Jo...but I’m also the girl who games ‘til 6 and sleeps in ‘til 3! If I can’t even get into art school like my mom wants, why should I have to forfeit my slacker life to save the world?!

records.title: The Immoral Duke Needs to Be Homeschooled
records.synopsis: Reincarnated as a side character in Contractual Marriage to a Dangerous Duke, Estella works as a governess in the wealthy Bertha mansion. She bonds with her pupils, siblings Cedric and Cecilia, and is determined to save them from a tragic fate at the hands of Diego, their handsome but dangerous half-brother. To save them, Estella strikes a deal with Diego: spare the children and she will marry him. After all, a contractual marriage means love will certainly not be part of the deal… right?

records.title: Frozen Wolf, Fire Dragon
records.synopsis: Eve was once a human woman who loved to read romance novels. But after being reincarnated as an ice magic-wielding wolf hybreed in one of her favorite stories, Eve runs into a dragon hybreed named Rahel who will kill her in the future and fall in love with her little brother, Sion. Now, Eve thinks her only hope of survival is to save enough money to move to the human world. But as Rahel grows more attached to her, Eve has no idea if she'll cool Rahel's fiery nature or burn in a blazing inferno!

records.title: My Blasted Reincarnated Life
records.synopsis: "The warrior Hamel went on an adventure with his companions to defeat the Demon Kings, but after dying just before the final battle with the Demon Kings…. “Waaah.” ‘What the fuck!’ He was reincarnated as the descendant of his fellow warrior, Vermouth. Hamel — no, Eugene Lionheart was reborn with the blood of the Great Vermouth."

records.title: Speak the Truth
records.synopsis: Some enemies start out as friends. Some friends start out as enemies. Some lovers start out as an evil nemeses from the fiery pits of hell. Prince Aron Vaughn hates the overachiever Quinton Underwood more than any person on this planet. Obviously, Quinton hates Aron with an indescribable passion, too, but their hate turns to something else as years go by, leading them into a new and unknown territory that neither boy is sure they are ready for. An adventure of friendship and learning about oneself as well as growing up from children to... well, sort of men. NOW AVAILABLE AS A COMIC!

records.title: OMEGA Magazine
records.synopsis: "When life gives you lemons, make lemonade,” they said. Sosuke might've hated lemons, but he wasn't blind to a good opportunity. Did he think the modeling job was a good idea as one of the world’s only omega males? No. Did he expect his teenage fantasy from ALPHA magazine to be his Fated Mate? Definitely not. And that said Fated held a secret that could threaten everything? Hell no! But in order to pursue his dream, he must reveal his true self to the world. Which, sometimes, is scarier than meeting your soulmate.

records.title: The Infinite Mage
records.synopsis: A boy of unknown origins and his loyal companions challenge their skills and beliefs as they set to carve out a name for themselves in the Kingdom of Tormia. Sirone wishes to become the best mage ever in a world where magic is akin to science. He must battle through numerous tribulations and enemies across different plains of existence to achieve his dream. Join Sirone's journey into the infinite world of magic, friendship, and self-actualization.

records.title: The Tyrant's Etiquette Tutor
records.synopsis: It's a tale as old as time: Livia is known as an elegant, cold daughter of Duke Blanche who upholds the etiquette of the noblesse above all else. Croft is a lonely Emperor shrouded in dark rumors in dire need of a proper court education. It seems the perfect match—except Livia, possessed by the spirit of a fiery reader who dropped the novel before reaching the end, is determined to change her fate as an Empress destined to die a violent death.

records.title: A Doomed Villainess's Guide to Survival
records.synopsis: Navina Dekarias has lived her doomed life twice. In each, she played the role as the perfect villainess, keeping her bloodthirsty empire's nobility in check with schemes and rumors. Except, in each life, she’s succumbed to the same fate: A bloody execution after being framed for assassinating the prince by her cheating husband and his mistress! Well, third life’s the charm! In this one, Navina’s changing the rules. Starting with marrying the man she’s destined to be framed for killing.

records.title: Riddle Me This
records.synopsis: Riddle - a question or statement intentionally phrased so as to require ingenuity in ascertaining its answer or meaning, typically presented as a game. Rather than calling it a riddle, one could say Gavin Harden, because that is exactly what he is, a question that only leaves you confused for it requires much thought and information in order to find the truth hidden behind every word. Be prepared though, because Gavin will not loose the game, not without a fight.

records.title: I Awakened A Hidden Class
records.synopsis: William has nothing. Poor beyond all measure and with no family, the future looks bleak. Until he is invited to begin a better life in a new world – the same world his brother went to before going missing years ago. At the Tutorial for those selected to venture to this new world, William learns each individual is given a Class and Skill to match their natural abilities. Except his Class is different than everyone else’s. It’s hidden, and potentially, could make him the strongest there is. But will this be enough to overcome the challenges that lay lie ahead – and to find his long-lost brother?

records.title: Your Majesty, Please Spare Me This Time
records.synopsis: Following the emperor’s unjust massacre of her family and her own miserable death, Laliette Bellua wakes up to find that she is in the body of her 12-year-old self. She immediately sets her sights on a single goal: suck up to Emperor Rupert Edgar Laspe Vellelum and save her family. However, in her present timeline, the future emperor is masquerading as Princess Rapertte! Can Laliette prove her ability to keep a secret and win the favor of the cruel princess?

records.title: Into the Light, Once Again
records.synopsis: Princess Alisa of Edenverre was cruelly executed by her own family for a crime she didn’t commit. She is then reincarnated as baby Aisha, the only princess of the Elmire Empire and Edenverre’s formidable rival. Born into a very different situation—with a new, loving family and the power of elementalism—she begins to heal from her trauma and sets out to discover the truth about why she was framed in her past life and explore the secrets of the mysterious Spirit King.

records.title: The Antidote to Doubt
records.synopsis: Carter is a senior Business major at East Gale University and he's desperate for an internship. On his way to an interview at Sinas, the most prestigious company in the city, he bumps into a man who ends up spilling coffee all over them. Carter throws out some choice words and thinks that's the end of it... until the coffee-spiller turns out to be his boss. Now Carter is stuck working under Zeke, who says he's moved on since the coffee incident but keeps piling more and more work on Carter's desk. How is Carter supposed to survive senior year when his boss won't let him catch a break? Especially when that boss is way more attractive than he has any right to be...

records.title: Bad Moon
records.synopsis: Surviving a wolf attack in a cemetery, Jaylin Maxwell finds himself entangled with the mysterious public figure, Quentin Bronx. After a series of stalkings from wolves, Jaylin seeks out Quentin for answers, and finds more than he bargained for. His ties to Quentin reveal a dangerous truth: there is a monster inside Jaylin, and the wolves of the East are coming for him.

records.title: My Secretly Hot Husband
records.synopsis: Another lifetime, another hard life—Letitia’s misery continues as her uncle sends her off to the “Monster Lord” to fulfill an old pledge. Imp attacks! The three witches! A hideous masked devil hunter husband! Terrifying is an understatement. But as she becomes the lady of Halstead, the rumors fall apart. Lord Erden is caring, he likes bunnies, and that *gasp* perfect face under the mask! How can he not know he’s HOT? Can she help protect the castle from devils and help Erden see his true self?

records.title: Why Are You Sorry, Darling?
records.synopsis: Watching on helplessly as her beloved husband carried on a whirlwind affair with a beautiful commoner, then dying tragically only to be replaced right away by that same mistress, Duchess DeLov was a pitiful figure... in the book I didn't even bother finishing! Okay, well, I'm not going to live that way. Step one: Ruin his reputation. Step two: Secure a divorce. Step three: Enjoy my happy, rich, single life! ...Step four: Fake a relationship with a handsome stranger to shake off our stalkers.

records.title: My Bedeviled Duke Dreams of Murder
records.synopsis: Lady Aylin Montclair has three secrets: She remembers her previous life, she still possesses her divine power from when she was a saintess, and she wants to find her previous life's husband—the man who ended his own life to save her. But the last person she expected to be his reincarnation is the ruthless Duke Kazimir van Arkel. Kazimir reeks of murderous intent due to his severe lack of sleep—every night he suffers from bloody, horrible nightmares. Not even the High Priest’s power can help him, so he’s ready to give up trying. And then he meets Lady Aylin. His past life's love—and the only one who can break his curse.

records.title: A Wicked Tale of Cinderella's Stepmom
records.synopsis: I’ve been reborn into the story of Cinderella, not as the heroine herself, but as the evil stepmother! The real Mildred Vans has worked Cinderella as a servant for the past six months, but I’m going to make things right and raise her like one of my own. Cinderella will marry the prince, but I still need husbands for my other daughters. So why is this handsome Baron hanging around when he’s certainly too old to marry any of my girls? And where is the fairy godmother? Is this the right story?

records.title: The Archduchess's Loyal Shapeshifter
records.synopsis: Rosalin, the empire's archduchess, has a mysterious new lover—Fenrir, a lowborn shapeshifting anthromorph. However, in their classist world, their love can't bloom easily. Turning a blind eye to the empire's injustices, Rosalin showed no interest in anyone but herself. Having never known his parents, let alone his name, Fenrir trusted no one. In a society full of prejudice and hate, can this unlikely couple overcome the odds stacked against them?

records.title: The S-Class Healer is the Angel of Death
records.synopsis: “Kill them before you heal them.” Elara Max has survived by this ruthless code, hiding her S-Class Healer abilities behind a trail of calculated deaths. For ten years, no one suspected a thing—until Eryx Arcanis happened. A decorated S-Class Raider and savior to many, Eryx is a hero on paper… and Elara’s worst nightmare in the flesh. When she breaks her own rule to save him, the bastard repays her by blackmailing her into a partnership she never asked for. In a world overrun with monster-infested Domains, Eryx wants to be a savior to find his savior. But Elara’s chasing vengeance, not redemption—and she plans to live up to her name as the “Angel of Death.” She may look like an angel, but she might be the worst monster of all. And monsters don’t need saving.

records.title: The Divine Twilight's Return
records.synopsis: The Divine Twilight had been a mere mortal, but he successfully became a deity. While living as the notorious fiend, he lost his divine essence, faith, and divine rank, and he no longer had divine power; he had lost everything. “I want you to do a job for me.” Thanatos, the ruler of the Underworld, made an offer… The Divine Twilight took his offer and began to live as the Player Lee Chang-Sun again to strangle the deities that had pushed him to the abyss! ‘I’m really back.’

records.title: The Demon's Darling Daughter
records.synopsis: Mia Evelan has never left the tiny room where her aunt and uncle keep her locked up. Then one night, she has a series of dreams that show her the future, and learns that her true father could be a demonic grand duke. Knowing this, Mia plans to escape her room and ask the grand duke for child support so she can strike out on her own. But once they've met, her father isn't intent on letting her go so easily! Should Mia choose a life of independence or one with her newly found demon family?

records.title: The Housekeeper of the Dungeon
records.synopsis: Huina Lee is just your average Korean office worker living in a world plagued by the video-game-like System and the deadly dungeons it spawns. She awakens one day as a Metahuman—people who can interact with the System—but with the quirky and novel class of “Housekeeper.” With perseverance, pluck, and a positive attitude, Huina works her way up the strongest Hunter guild in Korea through tasty meals, cozy beds, new friends, and more than a little bit of System-granted luck.

records.title: Lord Baby Runs a Romance Fantasy with Cash
records.synopsis: Romance fantasies were my happy little refuge. I’ve read countless novels and left tons of top comments in RF forums, and where did that lead me? To getting hit by a reincarnation truck! Now I’m stuck in a zero-star rated story fighting for my life! My father, the vile Duke Phaeraton, abandoned me. I’m barely surviving, no thanks to my thieving uncle, Marquess Tarenka. I’m not even the heroine of this novel! But what’s this? “QUEST COMPLETE. ABILITY ACTIVATED.” Is this my ticket out of here?

records.title: Life, Once Again
records.synopsis: Han Maru has not lived a particularly good life, nor a particularly bad life. He has drifted from job to job after an unfocused youth, and ends up a bus driver before he dies in an automobile accident. But he’s sent back in time to his peaceful high school days with only vague impressions of his past life, given the opportunity to make all the right choices this time and achieve the dreams he wanted to in his first life.

records.title: Vampire Hunter D
records.synopsis: 12,090 A.D. It is a dark time for the world. Humanity is just crawling out from under three hundred years of domination by the race of vampires known as the Nobility. The war against the vampires has taken its toll; cities lie in ruin, the countryside is fragmented into small villages and fiefdoms that still struggle against nightly raids by the fallen vampires-and the remnants of their genetically manufactured demons and werewolves. Every village wants a Hunter - one of the warriors who have pledged their laser guns and their swords to the eradication of the Nobility. But some Hunters are better than others, and some bring their own kind of danger with them.

records.title: Taming the Green-Eyed Monster
records.synopsis: Attractive, charming, and incapable of jealousy, Ye Jun is known as the “Ice Prince” around campus. Jong In is his socially awkward friend, who suffers from speech disfluency (aka stuttering) and has feelings for Ye Jun. Unable to reciprocate his feelings, Ye Jun tries to distance himself only to start experiencing that elusive emotion when a beautiful male stranger appears before them. The stranger suggests they all three date, making change between Ye Jun and Jong In's relationship inevitable.

records.title: Serving the Undying King
records.synopsis: Sylas, the newly crowned Undying King, is on a destructive path that threatens to tear him and his country apart. Plagued by paranoia and haunted by enemy spies, his last hope lies with his first love, Foster. A witch with a past that he can't escape, Foster must risk everything for the love of his life. But Sylas has changed since fate tore them apart, and their reunion is nothing like Foster could have hoped. Can they find a way to reconcile their present to save their future?

records.title: I Failed to Oust the Villain!
records.synopsis: Reborn as the daughter of a count she read about in a novel, Lady Valeta knows the story ends in tragedy at the hands of her lowly house pet, Reinhart. Having never wanted him in the first place, Valeta tries but fails to oust him from her house. But when Reinhart’s powerful magic is awakened one day, he kills all those around her, and it is now Valeta who is at his mercy. Though the tables have turned, Reinhart can't shake his attachment for Valeta. He lets her live, but only within his grasp.

records.title: Descent of the Demon Master
records.synopsis: He had always wished to live a new, ordinary life. That was his one and only wish. But the world did not allow him to. 'I wanted to live ordinarily, but you're the ones who provoked me first!' Who was the one who provoked the sleeping lion first? It's now time to witness the great Demon Master's reproval of the modern times!

records.title: Blinding Lights
records.synopsis: It has been nearly three years since GRiD—a fictional Kpop group—last saw the limelight before serving their mandatory military service. Now, they are making a comeback. Minjae as the lead dancer, wants to make sure that everything is perfect…down to the tiniest details. Except fanservice. Especially the part where people expect Minjae and his bandmate Do-hyun to act as lovers. Unfortunately, Minjae has a secret—he once fell for Do-hyun in real life as well. Swearing not to make the same mistake ever again, he decides to ignore his feelings for the time being. Soon, Minjae finds himself in deep trouble when the chemistry the two clearly have on stage starts to leak into real life as well.

records.title: Doctor Player
records.synopsis: The only chance a king's scorned bastard has at a decent life is to become a healer, but Raymond's healing ability is abysmal, leaving him still a lowly apprentice after five years of training. But one day, Raymond has a dream that fills his head with knowledge of a mystical discipline called "medical science." With this revolutionary ability in hand, Raymond is going to end up swimming in money... And save a lot of lives. That too.

records.title: Children of the Rune
records.synopsis: Boy! You absolutely must survive! After his family is destroyed by his uncle, all Boris is left with is his sword, Winterer, which has been passed down from his ancestors. However, this priceless artifact is the envy of many people's eye. Every time someone tries to steal Winterer, Boris' heart grows a little bit colder. Boris' journey to survive and protect his family's sword begins now, but what secret does Winterer hold? And what awaits him at the end of his journey?

records.title: Author of My Own Destiny
records.synopsis: Evil mage Fiona Green was destined to die at the hands of the protagonist couple in “The Emperor and the Saint.” That is, until the story’s author became Fiona herself! Though mistreated, cast out by her pompous family and thrown into the battle at Heylon, Fiona is determined to use her magic for good. But things take a rather unexpected turn when she rescues the male lead, Siegren, turning him from foe to friend… Will she successfully rewrite her fate without changing the story’s happy ending?

records.title: My Daughter Is The Final Boss
records.synopsis: Lee Seojun could only watch as his daughter, the witch Lee Seola, turned into the wicked final boss who destroyed the world and brought upon his death. Though never a good dad, as he loses consciousness, Seojun gets a new quest: “Change The Future.” Upon awakening, he sees a 5-year-old Seola standing before him. Now, Seojun must raise Seola to avoid the misfortunes that originally turned her wicked and become the caring father she never had. The price of failure? Only the end of the world.

records.title: And so, the Prince Began His World Conquest
records.synopsis: Former delinquent Ahn Yu-An, dubbed the "Confucianism Breaker," buys a fantasy book series on a whim at an old bookstore. After falling asleep at his friend's funeral, he wakes up as Prince Yuan, a character from the book who died before the story began. Now, facing threats from secretive organizations, can he survive in this perilous world?

records.title: His Elite Omega
records.synopsis: Chiyo is a rare kind of Omega, an Elite Omega. Only one is born in every one hundred babies. They are unique: unable to be marked or impregnated by ordinary Alphas. They can only be tied to a dominant Alpha. Elite Omegas also carried soothing pheromones strong enough to calm even the most violent of Alphas. Suffering at the hands of an abusive relationship with his ex, Chiyo’s life takes a turn when he accidentally meets Lucian, a dominant alpha who hates omegas. They end up marrying purely for business reasons, but love and passion begins to blossom as they learn about each other. Romance comes to a halt when Chiyo’s ex refuses to let him go and past trauma resurfaces. Now Lucian, revealing his true nature as a very dangerous man of the mafia, has decided that he will deal with Chiyo’s ex using any means necessary. Can love still survive violence? [Series Content Warnings: Dubious consent, Sexual Content, Abuse, Assault, and Violence. Reader discretion is advised.]

records.title: Second Life Ranker
records.synopsis: Yeon-woo's twin brother disappeared five years ago, only for his pocket watch to suddenly fall into Yeon-woo's hands. Inside, Yeon-woo found a hidden message: "By the time you hear this, I will already be dead..." His brother, a talented genius, had been betrayed while climbing Obelisk, the Tower of the Sun God, a world where several universes and dimensions intersect. After learning the truth, Yeon-woo sets out on a quest for vengeance – he faces off against a Tower almost like a world unto itself, filled with dangerous factions, jealous rivals, and ancient plots. But he has a secret advantage: the pocket watch has stored the memories from his brother’s climb, with all the recollections of meeting extinct species and secret treasures. Will it be enough to defeat his brother’s enemies to reach the top of the tower?

records.title: You Didn't Tell Me the Start of My Transmigration was a Gate
records.synopsis: Even as the most acclaimed Hunter of her generation, Seoha Han couldn’t save the ones she loved from the destruction the Gates wrought on Earth. Now that she has transmigrated back to her first Gate, Seoha won’t let fate become her. Equipped with her skills as an Awakened, a living pistol, and the knowledge of humanity’s fate, she’ll defeat every monster in her path if it means another chance at living with—and loving—her found family at the end of the world.

records.title: Master Villainess the Invincible!
records.synopsis: Haewon Tang has a problem. Multiple, in fact. She’s the talentless eldest daughter of the Sichuan Tang Clan, her stepmother is scheming, and her engagement has just been called off. Also, this is not her life–she’s entered the body of the main villainess in a novel. But there’s still time for her to prevent the tragic ending she knows is in store for her. All she has to do is learn some martial arts, hunt down the Demonic Sect, and use what she knows of the novel to avoid the path of villainy.

records.title: The Dark Queens
records.synopsis: Calypso the Sea Queen wants the ghosts of the dead out of her waters – and goes head to head with Hades over it. The Queen of Hearts dares to fall in love with a dragon. The Ice Queen Luminesa must battle a mysterious evil that has invaded her kingdom. These three – along with Medusa, Persephone and other Queens of fable and myth – must face challenges and dangers that would crush a mere mortal. But they are anything but average.

records.title: Dungeon Odyssey
records.synopsis: When the war between the aboveground and underground ended, humanity was joined by so-called "dungeon babies," those gifted with supernatural abilities and an obsession with the labyrinths below ground. Despite being a dungeon baby, Kim Jinwoo suppressed his instincts, choosing to live an ordinary life as a guide and caring for his family. But when an expedition goes wrong and he somehow ends up becoming the new owner of a labyrinth, he discovers that he cannot ignore his instincts forever...

records.title: Wabah Hama: The Plague
records.synopsis: Fuxiao woke up with no memories of his identity or Bloodline. Survival instincts kicked in when he crossed paths with Topan, a prisoner of war. Topan wanted revenge against the kingdom that destroyed his homeland. Fuxiao just wanted to survive. Thus, an unlikely partnership was born. When Fuxiao’s mysterious blood slowly turns Topan into more beast than human, Fuxiao realized he had his ticket to freedom: a weapon named Topan.

records.title: Sovereign of Beasts
records.synopsis: No hard feelings. Those were the last words Rory heard before his teammates killed him with a smile. Yet someone decided it wasn’t the time for death to claim him. Rory regressed, desperately wanting to taste revenge. However, karma struck before he could, and Rory got his revenge without lifting a finger, so what’s next? Pick a new class, tame some pets, start a new adventure, get a loving wife, defeat some old foes, conquer some new ones. But most importantly, live life to the fullest.

records.title: The Mortician's Assistant
records.synopsis: Irene can't die. And in the aftermath of war, she abandons her past as a weapon and seeks refuge working at a quiet funeral home, But this peace is short lived when she discovers she can see the memories of the dead. Now, she must choose between a quiet life or facing the consequences of her violent past. It only gets worse when she starts to get memories of her own past life that may hold the secrets to her strange abilities.

records.title: Children of the Holy Emperor
records.synopsis: Lee Sungjin used to be the strongest hunter on Earth, until he was burned to death by the demon king's flames. He reawakened to find himself in the body of Morres, the notorious scumbag prince of the Holy Empire of Delcross. But he's not alone! The demon king is also trapped inside his head. With his new, unexpected ally, Sungjin gets to work improving himself in order to fit into this world and his new family. Will Sungjin be able to overcome his scumbag reputation and unveil the purpose of his second chance at life?

records.title: Lady Evony
records.synopsis: Accused of being a witch and a murderer, Evony’s imprisoned. For years, she awaits the day of her execution, her back bearing scars from beatings inflicted by the guards who despise her. But one day, she is granted her freedom and placed into the guardianship of Grand Duke Schneider. Warmed by his doting staff and under his admiring tutelage, she regains her strength and becomes the wild card in an intricate game of power. With nothing to lose, will Evony orchestrate a new future for the empire?

records.title: Sapphire in the Smoke
records.synopsis: Amongst the steam and grinding gears of Aeras, William Arliss carries a secret that could change the entire world. On the run from the corrupt military, he stows aboard an airship in the hopes of landing somewhere safer. What he doesn't realize is that the ship he boards is the Marauder, a vessel captained by Valkyrie, one of the most fearsome pirate lords to ever sail the skies. With untold dangers on the horizon, the last thing either of them expects...is romance.
